# Pull Request Template

## 📝 Description
Brief description of the changes introduced by this PR.

## 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New recipe (new notebook/recipe added)
- [ ] 🔧 Recipe improvement (enhancement to existing recipe)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure/tooling change
- [ ] 🔄 Refactoring (no functional changes)

## 📋 Changes Made
Detailed list of changes:
- 
- 
- 

## 🧪 Testing
Describe how you tested your changes:
- [ ] Ran the notebook from start to finish
- [ ] Tested with sample data
- [ ] Verified outputs are correct
- [ ] Checked dependencies install properly
- [ ] Tested on [specify environment: local/Colab/etc.]

## 📷 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots of notebook outputs, visualizations, or UI changes.

## 📚 Related Issues
Closes #(issue_number)

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## 📋 Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know about this PR.

## 🔍 Recipe-Specific Checklist (if applicable)
For new recipes or recipe modifications:
- [ ] README.md includes clear narrative and setup instructions
- [ ] Notebook includes all necessary pip install commands
- [ ] Sample data is provided or clearly explained how to obtain/format data
- [ ] All cells run successfully and produce expected outputs
- [ ] Visualizations are clear and properly labeled
- [ ] Error handling is included where appropriate
- [ ] Code follows Python best practices
